code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut best_start = 0
  mut best_len = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut word_start = 0
  mut in_word = false

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end

    if is_ws(b)
      if in_word
        let wlen = i - word_start
        if wlen > best_len
          best_len = wlen
          best_start = word_start
        end
        in_word = false
      end
    else
      if not in_word
        word_start = i
        in_word = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if in_word
    let wlen = n - word_start
    if wlen > best_len
      best_len = wlen
      best_start = word_start
    end
  end

  let w = string.substring(line, best_start, best_start + best_len)
  println("longest=#{w}")
end
